title: Awake, My Soul: The Story of the Sacred Harp
original_title: Awake, My Soul: The Story of the Sacred Harp
overview: A documentary film following the folk tradition of Sacred Harp singing, a type of shape-note singing, kept alive by amateur singers in the rural American South.
